backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Trip Pilot AI backend, defining data types (UserProfile, Itinerary, TravelGuide, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations for user profiles, itineraries, reviews, travel guides, and email captures with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's and page's purpose within the Trip Pilot AI application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Trip Pilot AI app, setting metadata/OG tags, loading Playfair Display font, including Google AdSense auto-ads script, and mounting the React app root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, planner, itinerary, shared, guides, admin) and wraps the app with ThemeProvider, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/ActivityCard.tsx: Card component displaying a single travel activity's name, type badge, description, and location, with embedded ReviewsList and AddReviewForm sections.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Google AdSense banner component that initializes the adsbygoogle push on mount and renders a responsive ins ad unit.
frontend/src/components/AddReviewForm.ts: Collapsible form for authenticated users to submit a star rating and comment review for a given item, using the useAddReview mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/AddTravelGuideFo: Admin form for creating new travel guides with title, description, and optional season fields, submitting via the useAddTravelGuide mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/BookingLinks.tsx: Renders a card with three external booking buttons (flights, hotels, activities) using generated affiliate URLs for a given destination and date range.
frontend/src/components/DayTimeline.tsx: Displays a single itinerary day divided into morning, afternoon, and evening time blocks, each rendering a list of ActivityCards.
frontend/src/components/EmailCaptureModa: Modal dialog that collects a user's email and optional destination, submits the data via a mutation hook, and shows a success state after submission.
Button that exports an itinerary as a PDF for premium users, or shows an upgrade prompt modal for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryDisplay: Full itinerary view showing a header with metadata/badges, booking links, and tabbed timeline/map views with share and PDF export actions.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryMap.tsx: Placeholder map component that lists activity locations from the itinerary and displays a 'coming soon' message for the interactive map feature.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryRequest: Form for creating a new itinerary by collecting destination, dates, interests, and budget tier, then submitting the request and navigating to the result page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping all pages with a Navigation bar, main content outlet, and a footer with branding and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, displaying the user's name or loading state based on current auth status.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Renders the sticky top navigation bar with links to Plan Trip and Guides pages, a logo, and a LoginButton component, using active-state styling based on current route.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile, submitting via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Fetches and renders a list of community reviews for a given item ID, showing each reviewer's avatar, name, star rating, and comment in cards.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Provides a button that generates a shareable link for an itinerary and displays it in a dialog with copy-to-clipboard and Twitter/Facebook sharing options.
frontend/src/components/TravelGuidesGrid: Fetches and displays travel guides in a responsive card grid, supporting an optional display limit and navigating to individual guide pages on click.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePromptMod: Renders a modal dialog listing premium features and an upgrade call-to-action button, with a note that subscription management is coming soon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, itineraries, reviews, travel guides, and email capture, using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines a tropical/sunset OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables, and adds custom utility classes for gradients and themed colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminGuidesPage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing travel guides that checks the caller's role and renders an access-denied card for non-admins, or shows the AddTravelGuideForm and TravelGuidesGrid for admins.
frontend/src/pages/GuideDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single travel guide that fetches all guides, finds the matching one by ID, and displays its metadata along with a list of example itineraries.
frontend/src/pages/GuidesPage.tsx: Simple page that renders a header and the TravelGuidesGrid component to display all available curated travel guides.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section with branding, CTA buttons, feature highlights, travel guides grid, and an email capture modal.
frontend/src/pages/ItineraryPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays a single itinerary by ID, handling loading, error, and not-found states, and passing ownership status to ItineraryDisplay.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: Trip planning page that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and renders the ItineraryRequestForm for logged-in users.
frontend/src/pages/SharedItineraryPage.t: Renders a read-only view of a shared itinerary by extracting the itinerary ID from a share URL parameter and fetching it via a query hook. Displays loading, error, not-found, or the itinerary content using ItineraryDisplay.
Generates affiliate booking URLs for flights (Expedia), hotels (Booking.com), and activities (Viator) based on destination and date parameters.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a tropical color palette using OKLCH variables, custom shadows, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Trip Pilot AI, noting a pending feature request (AR-1) to embed a user-provided custom code snippet, with Google AdSense already integrated.
